title: Generic Constraint
description: Limit the types that a generic parameter can accept using the extends keyword.
problemStatement:
Bounded generics! Write a function `loggingIdentity<T extends { length: number }>(arg: T): T`. It should print the `.length` of the argument.

**Requirement:** The generic type `T` MUST extend an object that has a `length` property.
hints: Constraints allow you to use specific properties (like `.length`) safely within generic code.
expectedOutput: Log of the length, then return arg
